'''ân-b-m''' ('''nabama''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wackyparse|wackyparse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-b-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wackyparse|wackyparse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-b-m
|-
! Lemma
| nabama
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nabamithi|nabamithi]] || [[word:nabamiji|nabamiji]] || [[word:nabamishi|nabamishi]] || [[word:nabami|nabami]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nabamuthuth|nabamuthuth]] || [[word:nabamujuj|nabamujuj]] || [[word:nabamushush|nabamushush]] || [[word:nabam|nabam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nabamuthu|nabamuthu]] || [[word:nabamuju|nabamuju]] || [[word:nabamushu|nabamushu]] || [[word:nabamu|nabamu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nabamufuth|nabamufuth]] || [[word:nabamufuj|nabamufuj]] || [[word:nabamufush|nabamufush]] || [[word:nabamuf|nabamuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nabamethe|nabamethe]] || [[word:nabameje|nabameje]] || [[word:nabameshe|nabameshe]] || [[word:nabame|nabame]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nabamothoth|nabamothoth]] || [[word:nabamojoj|nabamojoj]] || [[word:nabamoshosh|nabamoshosh]] || [[word:nabam|nabam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nabamotho|nabamotho]] || [[word:nabamojo|nabamojo]] || [[word:nabamosho|nabamosho]] || [[word:nabamo|nabamo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nabamofoth|nabamofoth]] || [[word:nabamofoj|nabamofoj]] || [[word:nabamofosh|nabamofosh]] || [[word:nabamof|nabamof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nabamĂŠthĂŠ|nabamĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:nabamĂŠjĂŠ|nabamĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:nabamĂŠshĂŠ|nabamĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:nabamĂŠ|nabamĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nabamathath|nabamathath]] || [[word:nabamajaj|nabamajaj]] || [[word:nabamashash|nabamashash]] || [[word:nabam|nabam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nabamatha|nabamatha]] || [[word:nabamaja|nabamaja]] || [[word:nabamasha|nabamasha]] || [[word:nabama|nabama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nabamafath|nabamafath]] || [[word:nabamafaj|nabamafaj]] || [[word:nabamafash|nabamafash]] || [[word:nabamaf|nabamaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:nabamasha|nabamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gonabamasha|gonabamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokinabamasha|gokinabamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:nabamnĂŒsha|nabamnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gonabamnknĂŒsha|gonabamnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokinabamnĂŒsha|gokinabamnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nabamshĂ«sha|nabamshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonabamnkshĂ«sha|gonabamnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinabamshĂ«sha|gokinabamshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nabamrosha|nabamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonabamnkrosha|gonabamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinabamrosha|gokinabamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nabamusha|nabamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gonabamnkmusha|gonabamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinabamusha|gokinabamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:nabamsherasha|nabamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gonabamnksherasha|gonabamnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokinabamsherasha|gokinabamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:nabamngasha|nabamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gonabamnkngasha|gonabamnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokinabamngasha|gokinabamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nabamyasha|nabamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gonabamnkyasha|gonabamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokinabamyasha|gokinabamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:nabamyamasha|nabamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gonabamnkyamasha|gonabamnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokinabamyamasha|gokinabamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:nabamnĂŒshĂ«sha|nabamnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonabamnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gonabamnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinabamnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokinabamnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nabamnĂŒrosha|nabamnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonabamnknĂŒrosha|gonabamnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinabamnĂŒrosha|gokinabamnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nabamnĂŒmusha|nabamnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonabamnknĂŒmusha|gonabamnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinabamnĂŒmusha|gokinabamnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:nabamshĂ«nĂŒsha|nabamshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonabamnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gonabamnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinabamshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokinabamshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nabamshĂ«rosha|nabamshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonabamnkshĂ«rosha|gonabamnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinabamshĂ«rosha|gokinabamshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nabamshĂ«musha|nabamshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonabamnkshĂ«musha|gonabamnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinabamshĂ«musha|gokinabamshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:nabamronĂŒsha|nabamronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonabamnkronĂŒsha|gonabamnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinabamronĂŒsha|gokinabamronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:nabamroshĂ«sha|nabamroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonabamnkroshĂ«sha|gonabamnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinabamroshĂ«sha|gokinabamroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nabamromusha|nabamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonabamnkromusha|gonabamnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinabamromusha|gokinabamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:nabamunĂŒsha|nabamunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonabamnkmunĂŒsha|gonabamnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinabamunĂŒsha|gokinabamunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:nabamushĂ«sha|nabamushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonabamnkmushĂ«sha|gonabamnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinabamushĂ«sha|gokinabamushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nabamurosha|nabamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonabamnkmurosha|gonabamnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinabamurosha|gokinabamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:nabam|nabam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŠbĂŠm|nĂŠbĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:honabam|honabam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:honĂŠbĂŠm|honĂŠbĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonabam|hohonabam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonĂŠbĂŠm|hohonĂŠbĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒnabam|nĂŒnabam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŠbĂŠm|nĂŒnĂŠbĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒnabam|nĂŒnĂŒnabam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒnĂŠbĂŠm|nĂŒnĂŒnĂŠbĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻnabam|nĂŻnabam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŠbĂŠm|nĂŻnĂŠbĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻnabam|nĂŻnĂŻnabam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻnĂŠbĂŠm|nĂŻnĂŻnĂŠbĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lunabam|lunabam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lunĂŠbĂŠm|lunĂŠbĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunabam|lulunabam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunĂŠbĂŠm|lulunĂŠbĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:linabam|linabam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:linĂŠbĂŠm|linĂŠbĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinabam|lilinabam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinĂŠbĂŠm|lilinĂŠbĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:konabam|konabam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:konĂŠbĂŠm|konĂŠbĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonabam|kokonabam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonĂŠbĂŠm|kokonĂŠbĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kenabam|kenabam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kenĂŠbĂŠm|kenĂŠbĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenabam|kekenabam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenĂŠbĂŠm|kekenĂŠbĂŠm]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
